location: On a corpse inside Gael Tunnel, directly below a Giant Land Octopus hanging from the cave ceiling.

source.name: Corpse beneath the Giant Land Octopus

tactics: Gael Tunnel sits on the Caelid/Limgrave border; from Rotview Balcony grace head south past a cemetery and drop down into the tunnel entrance
The chamber holding the item is full of regular Land Octopi plus one Giant Land Octopus hanging overhead — it's slow, so grab the item and retreat rather than fight it

This is a side room well before the dungeon's Magma Wyrm boss fog and the Moonveil katana drop further in — don't push past this point expecting more loot on the same run unless you're ready for that fight too
Two Radahn Soldiers patrol just outside the tunnel entrance and will aggro if approached carelessly
lore: A weapon from the Land of Reeds, built to be thrust like a spear but with enough blade along its haft to slash as well.

builds.name: Dex bleed poke
builds.why: C-scaling Dexterity — among the best of any base-game spear — plus built-in blood loss buildup makes it a strong dedicated Dex/bleed pick
